markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, priorities, and the Context Wiki's future.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New North Star:** The top priority is driving downloads of the "Intent" app over the next 3 months, using it as the primary CTA for all content.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** A new strategy is emerging, structured around four clusters: Awareness, Jobs to be Done, Tools, and Activation.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [**New Keyword Focus:** Content will target competitive intent (e.g., "Gaston," "Claude Team") and core product concepts like "long-running AI tasks" and "agent orchestration."](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [**Context Wiki Decision:** A final decision on the wiki's future (kill vs. invest) is due next Wednesday. It will be removed from the nav bar until then.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Priorities

  - [A new, work-in-progress content strategy is being developed for the QBR, structured around four clusters:](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [Awareness](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
      - [Jobs to be Done (JTBD)](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [Tools / Value Decision](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
      - [Activation / Product Adoption](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [The immediate focus is on scoping JTBDs and testing content hypotheses.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Interim content will continue to cover "code review" and "spec-driven" topics.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### New Keyword & Topic Focus

  - [New content will target two key areas:](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
      - [**Competitive Intent:** Keywords for tools like "Gaston" and "Claude Team" to capture users researching multi-agent orchestration platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
      - [**Core Product Concepts:** Topics defining the product's capabilities, including:](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
          - ["Long-running AI tasks"](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
          - ["Multi-agent" & "agent orchestration"](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
          - ["Spec-driven" & "live spec"](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
          - ["Ticket to PR" & "Ralph Wigan loop"](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

### "Intent" App Promotion

  - [**Goal:** Drive as many downloads of the "Intent" app as possible over the next 3 months.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Downloads are a simple, trackable leading indicator of interest, even if the in-app funnel is not yet optimized.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [**Execution:** All new and refreshed content will feature a clear CTA to download the app.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

### Context Wiki Decision

  - [The wiki is in a "half dead state" but receives \~80 pages/day, creating a dilemma: invest or kill.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [**Decision:** A final call is due next Wednesday. Liz and Antilal are evaluating its potential for a JTBD content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [**Interim Action:** Sylvain will remove the wiki from the nav bar to improve site appearance while preserving its SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Liz:**](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [Add new keywords (competitive intent, core concepts) to the content backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
      - [Develop a plan to integrate "Intent" app CTAs into all content.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [Deliver a final decision on the Context Wiki's future by next Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [**Sylvain:**](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
      - [Remove the Context Wiki from the website's nav bar.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [Finalize QBR goals and OKRs for the next week's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/kSfsuL-n7Ri4CB_oEe3-Dssypy2UHJa2?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
